name: Easy Foolproof Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, combine sugar, evaporated milk, and butter.
2. Boil the mixture until it reaches 236°F on a candy thermometer (soft ball stage).
3. Remove from heat and stir in marshmallow cream, semisweet chocolate, walnuts, and vanilla.
4. Stir until the chocolate is melted and the mixture is well blended.
5. Spread the mixture evenly into a buttered 9-inch square pan.
6. Allow to cool until firm.
7. Cut the fudge into desired pieces.
8. Store in an airtight container in a cool, dry place.
